pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 21 and export_result.sh line 33 both reference 'Premium' as the tag name for database queries
Code analysis: The tag slug 'premium' is never referenced or verified in any script. Export script only checks tag names via wp_terms.name field, not slug field
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 21 and export_result.sh line 34 both reference 'Eco-Friendly' as the tag name for database queries
Code analysis: The tag slug 'eco-friendly' is never referenced or verified in any script. Export script only checks tag names via wp_terms.name field, not slug field
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 21 and export_result.sh line 35 both reference 'Gift Idea' as the tag name for database queries
Code analysis: The tag slug 'gift-idea' is never referenced or verified in any script. Export script only checks tag names via wp_terms.name field, not slug field
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 38 and export_result.sh line 43 both reference 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' for product lookup via LIKE '%Organic Cotton T-Shirt%'
Code analysis: export_result.sh line 76 checks TSHIRT_HAS_PREMIUM assignment using check_assignment function with tag_name='Premium'
Code analysis: export_result.sh line 77 checks TSHIRT_HAS_ECO assignment using check_assignment function with tag_name='Eco-Friendly'
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 44 and export_result.sh line 44 both reference 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' for product lookup via LIKE '%Wireless Bluetooth Headphones%'
Code analysis: export_result.sh line 80 checks PHONES_HAS_PREMIUM assignment using check_assignment function with tag_name='Premium'
Code analysis: export_result.sh line 81 checks PHONES_HAS_GIFT assignment using check_assignment function with tag_name='Gift Idea'
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 50 and export_result.sh line 45 both reference 'Merino Wool Sweater' for product lookup via LIKE '%Merino Wool Sweater%'
Code analysis: export_result.sh line 84 checks SWEATER_HAS_ECO assignment using check_assignment function with tag_name='Eco-Friendly'
Code analysis: export_result.sh line 85 checks SWEATER_HAS_GIFT assignment using check_assignment function with tag_name='Gift Idea'

privileged_info_summary: The task creates and assigns three product tags in WooCommerce. Tag names verified: Premium, Eco-Friendly, and Gift Idea (all confirmed in both setup and export scripts). Product names verified: Organic Cotton T-Shirt, Wireless Bluetooth Headphones, and Merino Wool Sweater (created by setup_task.sh if missing, verified by export_result.sh). Tag assignments verified via database queries: T-Shirt→Premium+Eco-Friendly, Headphones→Premium+Gift Idea, Sweater→Eco-Friendly+Gift Idea. Data is synthetic (created by task setup scripts). Tag slugs in metadata are unverified—they appear in task.json but are never checked by any verification code.
